summary: Tested RefillOps full-stack app (FastAPI + React + MongoDB). Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed covering auth (login success/401, bearer enforcement, /auth/me), spare parts seed/add-stock/log, parties CRUD, job create/list/filter/update/get-404, dispatch (stock deduction + 'out' StockLog), edit-after-dispatch blocked, double-dispatch blocked, dashboard stats. Frontend: Login -> Dashboard -> New Job -> Jobs list -> Parties (Add) -> Stock -> History flow validated end-to-end via Playwright. Extinguisher type->size/unit auto-fill works (CO2 kg, Water ltr). Job creation, save, navigation to detail all functional. Stock page renders 6 seeded parts with Add Stock buttons. History shows the dispatched job and totals.

issues: Tab labels render in lowercase ('active', 'dispatched') instead of Title Case ('Active', 'Dispatched'). Cosmetic capitalization inconsistency.
Uses browser-native HTML5 date inputs (mm/dd/yyyy) rather than a shadcn Calendar/DatePicker component. Looks inconsistent with the otherwise polished UI and is locale-dependent.
Radix DialogContent warning in console: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}'. Add a DialogDescription for a11y.

action_items: (Optional) Replace native <input type=date> on History page with shadcn Calendar/DatePicker for consistency.
(Optional) Add DialogDescription to Party Add/Edit modal to remove Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.95 deprecation).
JWT_SECRET in backend/.env has a static default ('refillops-secret-2026-change-in-production') - fine for internal tool but document need to rotate before prod.
Dispatch endpoint deducts stock without checking if currentStock >= quantityUsed; can produce negative stock silently. Consider validating or warning.
No idempotency / concurrency control on dispatch (race condition could double-deduct if endpoint called twice in parallel before status flips).
Dashboard monthlyDeliveryCost relies on ISO string comparison with '$gte/$lt' on dispatchedAt - works because format is uniform UTC isoformat, but storing as native datetime would be more correct.
CORS is wide-open ('*') with allow_credentials=True - browsers will reject credentialed requests; tighten origins for safety.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created: parties (TEST_Party), jobs (TEST_JobParty - dispatched), stock-in on ABC Valve and Spindle. Frontend tests created: TEST_UI_Party (active job), TEST_UIParty (party).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints fully covered by /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (11 tests, all green). Frontend flows verified via Playwright. No blocking bugs. Only cosmetic/code-review feedback items remain. Test data uses TEST_ prefix. Public URL: https://ops-dashboard-173.preview.example.com.
